steps.name: basics
steps.label: Basics
steps.description: You're about to deploy **Cloud Custodian**! If you need additional guidance, visit our [Getting Started](https://eden-akers.com/) page.

location.label: Region
location.toolTip: Region for the resource group and storage account.

options.text: Run the PowerShell snippet below in Azure Cloud Shell to authorize our application (service principal) for (read only) operations.
Open Azure Cloud Shell via the >_ icon at the top-right of the portal, then paste the script below, press enter and leave it running while you continue with the next steps in this form.

elements.name: psScript
elements.label: PowerShell snippet (copy + paste into Cloud Shell)
elements.defaultValue: $ErrorActionPreference='Stop'; $spnAppId='9bbe10c7-e81b-407f-a8a8-79837a6e35b1'; Write-Host 'Looking up the Cloud Custodian service principal...' -ForegroundColor Cyan; $spnObjectId=(Get-AzADServicePrincipal -ApplicationId $spnAppId).Id; if(-not $spnObjectId){throw 'Service principal not found - consent to the Cloud Custodian app first! (you can restart at the welcome page)'}; Write-Host "Found service principal objectId $spnObjectId" -ForegroundColor Green; $readerRoleId='acdd72a7-3385-48ef-bd42-f606fba81ae7'; $monitorRoleId='43d0d8ad-25c7-4714-9337-8ba259a9fe05'; $costReaderRoleId='72fafb9e-0641-4937-9268-a91bfd8191a3'; $blobRoleId='ba92f5b4-2d11-453d-a403-e96b0029c9fe'; $tableRoleId='0a9a7e1f-b9d0-4cc4-a60d-0319b160aaa3'; Write-Host 'Checking your access....' -ForeGroundColor Cyan; $myObjectId=(Get-AzADUser -SignedIn).Id; $tenantRoot="/providers/Microsoft.Management/managementGroups/$((Get-AzContext).Tenant.Id)"; $hadAccess=[bool](Get-AzRoleAssignment -ObjectId $myObjectId -Scope '/' -RoleDefinitionName 'User Access Administrator' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue); if(-not $hadAccess){Write-Host 'Elevating access for tenant-wide read roles...' -ForegroundColor Cyan;Invoke-AzRestMethod -Path '/providers/Microsoft.Authorization/elevateAccess?api-version=2016-07-01' -Method POST | Out-Null; Start-Sleep 30}; Write-Host 'Assigning Reader, Monitoring Reader and Cost Management Reader across your tenant. You can start the deployment now.' -ForegroundColor Cyan; foreach($r in $readerRoleId,$monitorRoleId,$costReaderRoleId){New-AzRoleAssignment -ObjectId $spnObjectId -RoleDefinitionId $r -Scope $tenantRoot -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null}; if(-not $hadAccess){Get-AzRoleAssignment -ObjectId $myObjectId -Scope '/' -RoleDefinitionName 'User Access Administrator' | Remove-AzRoleAssignment}; Write-Host 'Now waiting for the storage account and its container to deploy - this checks every subscription you can see, so keep this window open and finish the wizard...' -ForegroundColor Yellow; $sa=$null; $deadline=(Get-Date).AddMinutes(30); $subs=Get-AzSubscription; while(-not $sa -and (Get-Date) -lt $deadline){foreach($sub in $subs){$null=Set-AzContext -SubscriptionId $sub.Id; foreach($c in (Get-AzStorageAccount | Where-Object {$_.StorageAccountName -like 'saeacc*'} | Sort-Object CreationTime -Descending)){if(Get-AzRmStorageContainer -ResourceGroupName $c.ResourceGroupName -StorageAccountName $c.StorageAccountName -Name 'cloud-custodian-landing' -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue){$sa=$c; Write-Host "  Found $($c.StorageAccountName) in subscription $($sub.Name)" -ForegroundColor Green; break}}; if($sa){break}}; if(-not $sa){Start-Sleep 15; Write-Host '  ...still waiting for the storage account + container' -ForegroundColor DarkGray}}; if(-not $sa){throw 'Timed out waiting for the storage account. Re-run this script once the deployment has finished.'}; $null=Set-AzContext -SubscriptionId $sa.Id; Write-Host "Storage account $($sa.StorageAccountName) detected, assigning data roles..." -ForegroundColor Green; foreach($r in $blobRoleId,$tableRoleId){New-AzRoleAssignment -ObjectId $spnObjectId -RoleDefinitionId $r -Scope $sa.Id -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue | Out-Null}; Write-Host 'All done! Authorization complete - you may close Cloud Shell.' -ForegroundColor Green

elements.name: confirmTenantWideScriptRun
elements.label: I confirm the script above is still running
elements.toolTip: This ensures the resources we deploy are correctly authorized.

options.text: Use this step if your governance policy requires tags. You can apply tags to the main resource group and/or the deployed storage account.
